title: Drill down/Table view in Widget not working
excerpt: I have 7 shareable boards where I connected to one main board. I then added widgets with stacked bar graphs that retrieves due dates from the shareable boards. However, when I double-click on an item on the graph, it doe…

posts.author: carlcabrera (Isacarl Cabrera)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have 7 shareable boards where I connected to one main board. I then added widgets with stacked bar graphs that retrieves due dates from the shareable boards. However, when I double-click on an item on the graph, it doesn’t show the table drill down for that item. Is this feature only available to widgets accessing one board?

image735×162 5.44 KB

The only way I can view the table view for the item is when I full screen the widget and split the board.

posts.author: jhamiter (Johnathan Hamiter)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @carlcabrera ! I believe the drill down only works for status and people columns at the moment. It’s pretty frustrating, but my understanding is they’re working to bring that functionality to other columns.
